Minimap.name: className
Minimap.description: Optional extra className applied to the outer container.

Minimap.name: maxSize
Minimap.description: Maximum size for the minimap thumbnail (CSS pixels). The thumbnail preserves the page aspect ratio so the actual dimensions are at most `maxSize` on the longer axis. Defaults to `72` - a small peripheral tile rather than a large preview.

Zoom.name: className
Zoom.description: Optional extra className applied to the outer container.

LayerList.name: title
LayerList.description: Optional title rendered above the list. Pass an empty string to omit the header entirely (useful when the surrounding shell already labels the panel).

LayerList.Row.name: index
LayerList.Row.description: Display index in the visible (z-desc) list.

LayerList.Row.name: readOnly
LayerList.Row.description: When `true`, drag-reorder and the hide/lock toggles are suppressed.

LayerList.Row.name: onMoveRow
LayerList.Row.description: Reorder callback fired when a row is dragged over another row's hover midpoint, mirroring the Pages primitive's behavior.

LayerList.Row.name: onRename
LayerList.Row.description: Commit a new layer name (empty string clears it back to the derived label).

LayerRow.name: index
LayerRow.description: Display index in the visible (z-desc) list.

LayerRow.name: readOnly
LayerRow.description: When `true`, drag-reorder and the hide/lock toggles are suppressed.

LayerRow.name: onMoveRow
LayerRow.description: Reorder callback fired when a row is dragged over another row's hover midpoint, mirroring the Pages primitive's behavior.

LayerRow.name: onRename
LayerRow.description: Commit a new layer name (empty string clears it back to the derived label).

TextEditor.name: scale
TextEditor.description: Canvas display scale (pageScale * zoom). The stored font size is in points; multiply by this so the rendered text tracks the scaled box.

DrawingCanvas.name: finalScale
DrawingCanvas.description: Display scale applied by Canvas (pageScale * zoom).

useSectionDrag.name: groupDrag
useSectionDrag.type: { size: number; onStart: () => void; onMove: (dx: number, dy: number) => void; onEnd: () => void; } | undefined
useSectionDrag.description: Group drag hook (Phase 16). When provided and `groupDrag.size > 1`, the section's individual `onUpdate` is bypassed in favour of `groupDrag.onMove(dx, dy)` so the whole selection translates together. Coordinates are in canvas display pixels (matching the input movement), so the receiver converts to PDF points itself.

useSectionDrag.name: onDragEnd
useSectionDrag.description: Fired once when a drag gesture ends (pointer up). Used for frame adoption: the section view recomputes whether the dropped section now sits inside a container frame. No-op while resizing or read-only.

useImageCrop.name: scale
useImageCrop.description: Display scale: `finalScale` from useEditorSection. Pointer deltas arrive in display pixels; the hook divides by `scale` before applying them to the crop region (which lives in PDF points).

SectionCropOverlay.name: scale
SectionCropOverlay.description: Display scale (`finalScale`) - point values are multiplied by this to render in display pixels so the overlay aligns with the visible section box.

Toaster.name: toastOptions
Toaster.description: Override the default toast styling. Defaults to a theme-token-styled card matching `bg-card` / `text-card-foreground`. Anything you pass deep-merges into the bundled defaults, so consumers only need to set the fields they want to change.

Ruler.name: className
Ruler.description: Optional extra className applied to the outer container.

Ruler.name: unit
Ruler.description: Override the display unit. Falls back to `display.rulerUnit` from the editor context (defaults to `'pt'`).

TemplateGallery.name: templates
TemplateGallery.description: Templates to render - order is preserved.

TemplateGallery.name: onTemplateSelected
TemplateGallery.description: Fired after the template has been applied via the editor's `UPDATE_DOCUMENT` action. Useful for analytics or closing a dialog.

TemplateGallery.name: className
TemplateGallery.description: Optional className wrapping the gallery grid.

KeybindingHelp.name: keymap
KeybindingHelp.description: Override the displayed keymap. Defaults to DEFAULT_KEYMAP. Pass the same partial map you handed to `Editor.Root` `keybindings` so the dialog reflects the actual active bindings. Anything omitted falls back to the default - the merge mirrors what the runtime layer does.

KeybindingHelp.name: open
KeybindingHelp.description: Externally control the open state. When omitted, the dialog manages its own visibility and listens for the `showHelp` keybinding to toggle.

KeybindingHelp.name: onOpenChange
KeybindingHelp.description: Called when the user requests open/close.

Toolbar.name: children
Toolbar.description: Optional children. When provided, the toolbar renders the inverse default layout and shows whatever children the caller passes. When omitted, falls back to the bundled default layout - the same arrangement the editor has always shipped with.

AddShapeButton.name: shape
AddShapeButton.description: Which shape primitive to insert. Defaults to `'rect'`.

AddShapeButton.name: label
AddShapeButton.description: Override the displayed label. Defaults to "Add Rectangle/Circle/Line".

AddShapeButton.name: iconOnly
AddShapeButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

AddShapeButton.name: variant
AddShapeButton.description: Override the icon-only button variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

AddShapeButton.name: className
AddShapeButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button.

FrameToolButton.name: iconOnly
FrameToolButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

FrameToolButton.name: variant
FrameToolButton.description: Override the idle (tool-off) icon-only variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

FrameToolButton.name: activeVariant
FrameToolButton.description: Override the active (tool-armed) icon-only variant. Defaults to `'orange'`.

FrameToolButton.name: className
FrameToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button while idle.

FrameToolButton.name: activeClassName
FrameToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button while the tool is armed.

PreviewButton.name: iconOnly
PreviewButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

PreviewButton.name: variant
PreviewButton.description: Override the icon-only button variant. Defaults to `'white'`.

PreviewButton.name: className
PreviewButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button.

PrintButton.name: iconOnly
PrintButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

PrintButton.name: variant
PrintButton.description: Override the icon-only button variant. Defaults to `'cream'`.

PrintButton.name: className
PrintButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button.

ImageFrameToolButton.name: iconOnly
ImageFrameToolButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

ImageFrameToolButton.name: variant
ImageFrameToolButton.description: Override the idle (not-armed) variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

ImageFrameToolButton.name: activeVariant
ImageFrameToolButton.description: Override the armed variant. Defaults to `'orange'`.

ImageFrameToolButton.name: className
ImageFrameToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the toggle button while idle.

ImageFrameToolButton.name: activeClassName
ImageFrameToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the toggle button while the tool is armed.

DownloadButton.name: iconOnly
DownloadButton.description: Render a compact icon-only pair - a download glyph plus a tiny menu chevron - instead of the wide labeled "Download PDF" split button. Used in the app-shell top bar's monochrome icon cluster.

DownloadButton.name: variant
DownloadButton.description: Override the icon-only button variant. Defaults to `'sage'`.

DownloadButton.name: className
DownloadButton.description: Extra classes merged onto each icon-only button.

ShapeToolButton.name: iconOnly
ShapeToolButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

ShapeToolButton.name: variant
ShapeToolButton.description: Override the idle (not-armed) variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

ShapeToolButton.name: activeVariant
ShapeToolButton.description: Override the armed (drawing) variant. Defaults to `'orange'`.

ShapeToolButton.name: className
ShapeToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the toggle button while idle.

ShapeToolButton.name: activeClassName
ShapeToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the toggle button while the tool is armed.

AddImageButton.name: iconOnly
AddImageButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

AddImageButton.name: variant
AddImageButton.description: Override the icon-only button variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

AddImageButton.name: className
AddImageButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button.

SelectToolButton.name: iconOnly
SelectToolButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

SelectToolButton.name: variant
SelectToolButton.description: Override the idle icon-only variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

SelectToolButton.name: activeVariant
SelectToolButton.description: Override the active (selection-mode) icon-only variant. Defaults to `'orange'`.

SelectToolButton.name: className
SelectToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button while idle.

SelectToolButton.name: activeClassName
SelectToolButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button while selection mode is active.

RedoButton.name: variant
RedoButton.description: Override the button variant. Defaults to `'white'`.

RedoButton.name: className
RedoButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the button.

AddTextButton.name: iconOnly
AddTextButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

AddTextButton.name: variant
AddTextButton.description: Override the icon-only button variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

AddTextButton.name: className
AddTextButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button.

UndoButton.name: variant
UndoButton.description: Override the button variant. Defaults to `'white'`.

UndoButton.name: className
UndoButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the button.

DrawButton.name: iconOnly
DrawButton.description: Render a compact icon-only square button with an accessible label.

DrawButton.name: variant
DrawButton.description: Override the idle (not-drawing) icon-only variant. Defaults to `'caramel'`.

DrawButton.name: activeVariant
DrawButton.description: Override the active (drawing) icon-only variant. Defaults to `'orange'`.

DrawButton.name: className
DrawButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button while idle.

DrawButton.name: activeClassName
DrawButton.description: Extra classes merged onto the icon-only button while drawing is active.

PropertiesPanel.name: children
PropertiesPanel.description: Optional children. When provided, the panel renders them as the body - useful for custom compositions that swap sub-sections or add their own fields. When omitted, the panel falls back to the bundled default arrangement: `LayoutSection`, type-specific section (Text / Shape), then `LayerSection`. An empty selection always renders the EmptyState regardless of children.

PageBackground.name: pageIndex
PageBackground.description: Page to target. Defaults to the document's current page (1-based index, converted to 0-based internally to match the reducer action).

Canvas.name: children
Canvas.description: Two kinds of children are supported: 1. **Section template** - a single non-overlay child rendered once per section. Pass `<Editor.Section />` (or a custom section component that consumes useEditorSection) to control how each section is rendered. Defaults to the bundled `<Section />` when omitted. 2. **Canvas overlays** - primitives that opt in via the `__editorCanvasOverlay` marker (e.g. Editor.Zoom). These are rendered once, anchored to the canvas viewport, and have access to useEditorCanvas via context. Any number can be supplied alongside the section template.

Canvas.name: readOnly
Canvas.description: Force the canvas into read-only mode regardless of the root's `readOnly` flag. Defaults to `false`. The effective read-only state is `root.readOnly || canvas.readOnly` - either one is enough to suppress drag, resize, drop, file upload, and section-toolbar buttons. Set automatically by Editor.StaticCanvas.

Canvas.name: showControls
Canvas.description: Render the built-in top-right `CanvasControls` zoom strip. Defaults to `true`. Set `false` when the surrounding layout supplies its own zoom widget (e.g. the app-shell mounts a single bottom-center `Editor.Zoom`) so there is exactly one zoom control on the canvas.

StaticCanvas.name: children
StaticCanvas.description: Two kinds of children are supported: 1. **Section template** - a single non-overlay child rendered once per section. Pass `<Editor.Section />` (or a custom section component that consumes useEditorSection) to control how each section is rendered. Defaults to the bundled `<Section />` when omitted. 2. **Canvas overlays** - primitives that opt in via the `__editorCanvasOverlay` marker (e.g. Editor.Zoom). These are rendered once, anchored to the canvas viewport, and have access to useEditorCanvas via context. Any number can be supplied alongside the section template.

StaticCanvas.name: showControls
StaticCanvas.description: Render the built-in top-right `CanvasControls` zoom strip. Defaults to `true`. Set `false` when the surrounding layout supplies its own zoom widget (e.g. the app-shell mounts a single bottom-center `Editor.Zoom`) so there is exactly one zoom control on the canvas.

ShapeDraftPreview.name: kind
ShapeDraftPreview.description: Which primitive the armed shape tool will create.

ShapeDraftPreview.name: width
ShapeDraftPreview.description: Draft box size in display pixels (used only for the SVG viewBox aspect).

useCanvasZoom.name: step
useCanvasZoom.description: Step applied by zoom in/out buttons (defaults to 0.1).

useCanvasZoom.name: onZoomChange
useCanvasZoom.description: Optional callback fired whenever zoom changes (e.g. for analytics).

Properties.name: children
Properties.description: Optional children. When provided, the properties bar renders an empty shell with the children inside. When omitted, falls back to the bundled default layout (document name + page size + orientation, plus a mobile settings sheet).

PageSizeSelect.name: fullWidth
PageSizeSelect.description: When true, expands the trigger to fill its container (mobile sheet).

DocumentName.name: asTitle
DocumentName.description: Hide the trailing pencil affordance and tighten the input so the name reads as a plain title. Used by the app-shell top bar, where the name sits between a menu glyph and a chevron rather than in a labeled field. Defaults to `false`.

DocumentName.name: className
DocumentName.description: Extra classes merged onto the input.

OrientationSelect.name: fullWidth
OrientationSelect.description: When true, expands the trigger to fill its container (mobile sheet).

BrushWeightSlider.name: value
BrushWeightSlider.description: Active brush weight in PDF points (1-20).

BrushWeightSlider.name: onChange
BrushWeightSlider.description: Fired when the user moves the slider.

BrushWeightSlider.name: previewColor
BrushWeightSlider.description: Optional preview color used by the swatch. Defaults to current weight color.

usePdfGeneration.name: document
usePdfGeneration.description: Current editor document. Read at call time of download/print.

usePdfGeneration.name: onSizeKnown
usePdfGeneration.description: Called with the generated blob's size once download completes.

usePdfGeneration.name: backend
usePdfGeneration.description: Optional PDF backend override. Defaults to `@docmosaic/core` exports. Use this to swap the bundled jsPDF path for a custom implementation.

Root.name: children
Root.description: Extra nodes mounted **after** the default app-shell - custom dialogs, an extra toaster, analytics bridges, etc. The shell renders the full editor on its own, so children are purely additive overlays. Omit for the canonical `<Editor.Root />` usage.

Root.name: themeToggle
Root.description: Theme-toggle slot rendered in the top-bar right group. The package never imports `next-themes`; the host app injects a ready-made toggle node here. Renders nothing when omitted.

Root.name: showLeftRail
Root.description: Render the left rail (tool palette + Pages + Layers). Defaults to `true`.

Root.name: showToolPalette
Root.description: Render the tool palette inside the left rail. Defaults to `true`.

Root.name: showPages
Root.description: Render the "Pages" section inside the left rail. Defaults to `true`.

Root.name: showLayers
Root.description: Render the "Layers" section inside the left rail. Defaults to `true`.

Root.name: showInspector
Root.description: Render the right inspector panel. Defaults to `true`.

Root.name: pdf
Root.description: Pluggable PDF backend. Either or both functions can be overridden. Anything omitted falls back to the bundled `@docmosaic/core` implementation (`generatePDF` / `estimatePDFSize`). Use this to swap the jsPDF path for a different renderer, run generation in a Worker, or mock it out in tests.

Root.name: keybindings
Root.description: Keyboard shortcuts. - Omit (default): the built-in keymap is active - `mod+z` undo, `mod+shift+z` / `mod+y` redo, `Delete` / `Backspace` removes the selected section, `Escape` deselects, and `Arrow` / `Shift+Arrow` nudge the selected section by 1pt / 10pt. - Pass a partial EditorKeymap to override individual bindings or register alternates (e.g. `{ redo: 'mod+r' }`). - Pass `false` to disable the layer entirely - no window listener is attached. Bindings are skipped while focus is inside an `<input>`, `<textarea>`, `<select>`, or anything `contenteditable`, so text fields like the document-name input remain typeable.

Root.name: readOnly
Root.description: Render the editor in read-only / viewer mode. Defaults to `false`. When `true`: - Section drag, resize, drop, and file upload are suppressed. - Section floating toolbars (delete, duplicate, layer buttons) hide. - The properties bar (document name, page size, orientation) becomes read-only. - The page list hides Add Image / Add Page / per-page delete and ignores reorder gestures. - The `PropertiesPanel` renders its number/text inputs disabled and hides the Layer buttons. - The toolbar's `AddImageButton`, `AddTextButton`, `AddShapeButton`, `DrawButton`, `UndoButton`, and `RedoButton` hide themselves. - Keybindings skip every mutating action (`undo`, `redo`, `deleteSection`, `nudge*`); `deselect` (Esc) still works. - Drawing-mode pointer captures are ignored. What still works: - Selection (click, shift-click, marquee). - Zoom, pan, preview dialog, print, PDF/PNG download.

Root.name: showRuler
Root.description: Render `Editor.Ruler` along the top and left edges of the canvas viewport. Defaults to `false`. When `true`, the canvas reserves a 24px gutter on each axis so the rulers sit flush with the page edge without occluding section geometry.

Root.name: showMinimap
Root.description: Render `Editor.Minimap` anchored to the bottom-right of the canvas viewport - a thumbnail of the current page plus a viewport rectangle that pans the main canvas. Defaults to `false`.

Root.name: rulerUnit
Root.description: Unit used by `Editor.Ruler` tick labels. Defaults to `'pt'` so the tick values match the document's storage unit one-to-one. Set to `'mm'` or `'in'` to surface a human-facing measurement instead.

Root.name: defaultDocument
Root.description: Uncontrolled: optional seed for the internally-owned document.

ColorPicker.name: onChange
ColorPicker.description: Fired when the user picks a swatch or commits a custom color.

ColorPicker.name: presets
ColorPicker.description: Optional override for the swatch palette. Defaults to DEFAULT_COLOR_PRESETS (12 colors).

ColorPicker.name: disabled
ColorPicker.description: When `true`, the swatches and custom-color trigger become non-interactive and visually dim. The current `value` still shows so the swatch remains a label for the actively-selected color.

EditorShell.name: themeToggle
EditorShell.description: Host-injected theme toggle node rendered in the top-bar right group.

EditorShell.name: showLeftRail
EditorShell.description: Show the left rail (tool palette + Pages + Layers). Defaults to `true`.

EditorShell.name: showToolPalette
EditorShell.description: Show the tool palette inside the left rail. Defaults to `true`.

EditorShell.name: showPages
EditorShell.description: Show the "Pages" section inside the left rail. Defaults to `true`.

EditorShell.name: showLayers
EditorShell.description: Show the "Layers" section inside the left rail. Defaults to `true`.

EditorShell.name: showInspector
EditorShell.description: Show the right inspector panel. Defaults to `true`.

EditorShell.name: children
EditorShell.description: Extra nodes rendered after the shell - custom dialogs, toasters, or other overlays passed through `Editor.Root`'s `children`.

LeftRail.name: showToolPalette
LeftRail.description: Render the add/draw tool palette above the panels. Defaults to `true`.

LeftRail.name: showPages
LeftRail.description: Render the collapsible "Pages" section. Defaults to `true`.

LeftRail.name: showLayers
LeftRail.description: Render the collapsible "Layers" section. Defaults to `true`.

CollapsibleSection.name: label
CollapsibleSection.description: Small uppercase muted label shown in the section header.

CollapsibleSection.name: bodyClassName
CollapsibleSection.description: Extra classes for the body wrapper.

TopBar.name: themeToggle
TopBar.description: Host-injected theme toggle node. The package never imports `next-themes`; the app passes a ready-made toggle in. Renders nothing when omitted.

TopBar.name: onToggleLeftRail
TopBar.description: Toggle the left rail's collapsed state. Omit to hide the toggle.

TopBar.name: leftRailCollapsed
TopBar.description: Whether the left rail is currently collapsed (drives the toggle label).

TopBar.name: onToggleInspector
TopBar.description: Toggle the inspector's collapsed state. Omit to hide the toggle.

TopBar.name: inspectorCollapsed
TopBar.description: Whether the inspector is currently collapsed.

Guides.name: className
Guides.description: Optional extra className applied to the overlay container.

Pages.name: bare
Pages.description: Compact rail mode: render only the thumbnail strip plus a single "Add page" affordance - no internal "Pages" header, "Last modified" footer, or "Add Image" button. Used inside the app-shell left rail, where those concerns live elsewhere. Defaults to `false` (standalone sidebar).

PageThumbnail.name: isSelected
PageThumbnail.description: Whether this page is currently selected

PageThumbnail.name: onSelect
PageThumbnail.description: Callback when the page is selected

PageThumbnail.name: onDelete
PageThumbnail.description: Callback when the page is deleted

PageThumbnail.name: dragHandlers
PageThumbnail.type: { onDragStart: (e: DragEvent<Element>) => void; onDragEnd: () => void; onDragOver: (e: DragEvent<Element>) => void; }

PageThumbnail.name: dropIndicators
PageThumbnail.description: Visual indicators for drag and drop

PageThumbnail.name: readOnly
PageThumbnail.description: When `true`, the per-page delete button is hidden and the thumbnail is not `draggable` (so it cannot be reordered). The thumbnail still stays selectable. Defaults to `false`.

ContextMenu.name: children
ContextMenu.description: Children wrapped by the right-click trigger. Typically `Editor.Canvas` (or the page surface inside a custom shell).

ContextMenu.name: keymap
ContextMenu.description: Override the displayed shortcut chips. Defaults to DEFAULT_KEYMAP. Pass the same partial map you handed to `Editor.Root` `keybindings` so the inline shortcuts match the active runtime - the menu items themselves dispatch through useEditor actions regardless.

ContextMenu.name: className
ContextMenu.description: Optional class applied to the trigger wrapper.

useEditorKeybindings.name: deleteSection
useEditorKeybindings.description: Delete the currently selected section (no-op if none selected).

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeUp
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section up by 1pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeDown
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section down by 1pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeLeft
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section left by 1pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeRight
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section right by 1pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeUpLarge
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section up by 10pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeDownLarge
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section down by 10pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeLeftLarge
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section left by 10pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: nudgeRightLarge
useEditorKeybindings.description: Nudge the selected section right by 10pt.

useEditorKeybindings.name: showHelp
useEditorKeybindings.description: Toggle the Editor.KeybindingHelp dialog. Defaults to `mod+/` - the same chord used by Notion, GitHub, Slack, and most other web apps with a built-in keymap viewer. Read-only safe (the dialog is a passive viewer).

useDocumentState.name: initialDocument
useDocumentState.description: Optional seed document. Only read once (initial mount); subsequent changes to this prop are ignored. Pass a new key on the parent to force a remount if you need to swap documents.
